title: carlina biebersteinii subsp. brevibracteata
intro: Carlina biebersteinii subsp. brevibracteata, also known as the Pyrenean carline thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is native to the Pyrenees region and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Carlina biebersteinii subsp. brevibracteata are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Carlina biebersteinii subsp. brevibracteata include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
